messages.content:
这里有几种方法将数据写入CSV文件：

## 方法1：使用 csv 模块（推荐）

```python
import csv

data = [
    ('P~Single_Image_General_ShortCap~cn~llava_onevision_85m_mid_training_coyo_cn~1.0.0~0.0',
     'qwen3-vl-embedding-2B',
     's3://puyu-pretrain-h-users-common/wangrui/datasets/mlm_retrive_recall/llava-cpt-85m/fetch-image-path-260126/P~Single_Image_General_ShortCap~cn~llava_onevision_85m_mid_training_coyo_cn~1.0.0~0.0',
     3470155),
    ('P~Single_Image_General_ShortCap~cn~llava_onevision_85m_mid_training_datacomp1b_cn~1.0.0~0.0',
     'qwen3-vl-embedding-2B',
     's3://puyu-pretrain-h-users-common/wangrui/datasets/mlm_retrive_recall/llava-cpt-85m/fetch-image-path-260126/P~Single_Image_General_ShortCap~cn~llava_onevision_85m_mid_training_datacomp1b_cn~1.0.0~0.0',
     1626622),
]

# 写入CSV文件
with open('output.csv', 'w', newline='', encoding='utf-8') as f:
    writer = csv.writer(f)
    # 写入表头（可选）
    writer.writerow(['Dataset', 'Model', 'Path', 'Count'])
    # 写入数据
    writer.writerows(data)
```

## 方法2：使用 pandas（更强大）

```python
import pandas as pd

data = [
    ('P~Single_Image_General_ShortCap~cn~llava_onevision_85m_mid_training_coyo_cn~1.0.0~0.0',
     'qwen3-vl-embedding-2B',
     's3://puyu-pretrain-h-users-common/wangrui/datasets/mlm_retrive_recall/llava-cpt-85m/fetch-image-path-260126/P~Single_Image_General_ShortCap~cn~llava_onevision_85m_mid_training_coyo_cn~1.0.0~0.0',
     3470155),
    ('P~Single_Image_General_ShortCap~cn~llava_onevision_85m_mid_training_datacomp1b_cn~1.0.0~0.0',
     'qwen3-vl-embedding-2B',
     's3://puyu-pretrain-h-users-common/wangrui/datasets/mlm_retrive_recall/llava-cpt-85m/fetch-image-path-260126/P~Single_Image_General_ShortCap~cn~llava_onevision_85m_mid_training_datacomp1b_cn~1.0.0~0.0',
     1626622),
]

# 创建DataFrame
df = pd.DataFrame(data, columns=['Dataset', 'Model', 'Path', 'Count'])

# 写入CSV
df.to_csv('output.csv', index=False, encoding='utf-8')
```

## 方法3：手动拼接字符串

```python
data = [
    ('P~Single_Image_General_ShortCap~cn~llava_onevision_85m_mid_training_coyo_cn~1.0.0~0.0',
     'qwen3-vl-embedding-2B',
     's3://puyu-pretrain-h-users-common/wangrui/datasets/mlm_retrive_recall/llava-cpt-85m/fetch-image-path-260126/P~Single_Image_General_ShortCap~cn~llava_onevision_85m_mid_training_coyo_cn~1.0.0~0.0',
     3470155),
    ('P~Single_Image_General_ShortCap~cn~llava_onevision_85m_mid_training_datacomp1b_cn~1.0.0~0.0',
     'qwen3-vl-embedding-2B',
     's3://puyu-pretrain-h-users-common/wangrui/datasets/mlm_retrive_recall/llava-cpt-85m/fetch-image-path-260126/P~Single_Image_General_ShortCap~cn~llava_onevision_85m_mid_training_datacomp1b_cn~1.0.0~0.0',
     1626622),
]

with open('output.csv', 'w', encoding='utf-8') as f:
    # 写入表头
    f.write('Dataset,Model,Path,Count\n')
    # 写入数据
    for row in data:
        f.write(','.join(str(item) for item in row) + '\n')
```

**推荐使用方法1（csv模块）**，因为它：
- 是Python标准库，无需额外安装
- 自动处理特殊字符和引号
- 代码简洁清晰

如果需要更复杂的数据处理，推荐使用方法2（pandas）。
